title: MATH 341
text:
Course Materials

Required Course Materials




A First Course in Differential Equations, 3rd Ed. by J. David Logan, ISBN: 978-3-319-17852-3
A First Course in Differential Equations covers the basic topics in post-calculus differential equations. It is written for students in engineering, biosciences, physics, economics, and mathematics and emphasizes applications in those areas. Electronic access to A First Course in Differential Equations is available through the Weinberg Memorial Library. Access the book.
